text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 57 

DSNP_ZERODOLLAR 

LABEL: Medicare Zero-Dollar Cost Sharing D-SNP plan 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates if a Dual Eligible Special Needs plan (D-SNP) is a Medicare Zero-Dollar Cost Sharing D-SNP 
plan. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes (Medicare zero-dollar cost sharing plan) 
N = No (Medicare non-zero-dollar cost sharing plan) 
9 = Not
